The '''KV swoop''' was a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] manufactured by [[Kuat Vehicles/Legends|Kuat Vehicles]]. It was commonly used in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

The KV swoop was both tough and fast, with a top speed of more than six hundred kilometers per hour. It had a maximum flight ceiling of fifty meters.
